title: Feasibility Review Packet (V8.14)
description: One of three packets produced during the 3-pass PRD intake loop. Edgar produces Packet #1 (technical feasibility), Reid produces Packet #2 (code-perspective leaks against Edgar), Tobias produces Packet #3 (consolidated, with edgar_vs_reid arbitration and pie-in-sky callouts). Arthur aggregates all three for the user approval gate.

pass.description: Pass 1 = Edgar, Pass 2 = Reid, Pass 3 = Tobias.

edgar_packet_ref.description: Path/ID of Edgar's Packet #1. Required when reviewer is Reid or Tobias.

reid_packet_ref.description: Path/ID of Reid's Packet #2. Required when reviewer is Tobias.

flagged_claims.description: Edgar only. Specific PRD text Edgar wants flagged.

prerequisite_questions.description: Edgar only. Questions the user must answer before Marcus can SDD.

edgar_section_responses.description: Reid only. Reid's response to each of Edgar's section_verdicts.

missed_leaks.description: Reid only. Leaks Reid spotted that Edgar didn't flag.

edgar_vs_reid_arbitrations.description: Tobias only. Resolutions of Edgar-vs-Reid disagreements.

top_3_pie_in_sky.description: Tobias only. User's own pie-in-sky asks.

recommended_trims.description: Tobias only. Populated when recommendation == ship_with_trims.

user_questions.description: Tobias only. Populated when recommendation == iterate.

rejection_reason.description: Tobias only. Populated when recommendation == reject.

recommendation.description: Edgar uses proceed_to_reid / clarify_first / reject_early. Reid uses proceed_to_tobias / kick_back_to_edgar / reject_early. Tobias uses ship_as_is / ship_with_trims / iterate / reject.

review_mode.description: V8.15. `full` = first-time review of every section. `partial_diff` = Arthur dispatched this packet to review only PRD sections that changed since a prior version; unchanged sections carry forward via carry_forward_sections. Tobias is ALWAYS `full` regardless of mode.

previous_packet_ref.description: V8.15. Path/ID of the prior packet from the same reviewer on a prior PRD version. Required when review_mode == partial_diff. Edgar/Reid only — Tobias does not carry forward.

previous_prd_version.description: V8.15. Slug of the prior PRD version, e.g. `binance-funding-alerts-v1`, used by Arthur's diff tool to anchor the comparison.

current_prd_version.description: V8.15. Slug of the current PRD version, e.g. `binance-funding-alerts-v2`.

changed_sections.description: V8.15. Section names (matching PRD H2 headings) Arthur identified as changed between previous and current PRD. Edgar/Reid re-review ONLY these; verdicts on these sections OVERWRITE prior verdicts. Required when review_mode == partial_diff.

carry_forward_sections.description: V8.15. Sections unchanged between previous and current PRD. Edgar/Reid copy their prior verdicts for these sections from previous_packet_ref into section_verdicts / edgar_section_responses verbatim. No re-review, no token spend on these.

source_packet_id.description: ID of the prior packet whose verdict was copied for this section.

diff_summary.description: V8.15. Optional diff stats for telemetry.

change_ratio.description: sections_changed / sections_total. If > 0.5, Arthur MUST fall back to review_mode=full (revision too large to safely carry forward).
